name: Sour Cream Cocktail Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 9-inch square pan (or use a 13-inch x 9-inch size).
3. In a mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in the eggs one at a time.
5. Sift together the flour, baking soda, cinnamon, salt, nutmeg, and cloves.
6. Add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture alternately with the sour cream, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients.
7. Fold in the canned fruit cocktail.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
9. Bake for 45-50 minutes.
10. Allow to cool in the pan on a wire rack for about 5 minutes before serving.
11. Serve with sweetened whipped cream, if desired.
